query:
SELECT 
  title,
  SUM(CASE WHEN email IS NOT NULL AND email != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_email,
  SUM(CASE WHEN email IS NULL OR email = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_email,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM contacts
WHERE enrichmentSource = 'manual'
  AND enrichmentStatus = 'pending'
GROUP BY title
ORDER BY total DESC
LIMIT 30;
